meta.source_note: Steam 公开搜索页提供发售日期而非小时级发布时间；本报告按发售日期从新到旧选取最新条目。

items.title: 摸鱼作家Demo
items.short_description: 挂机写书。敲键盘、点击鼠标、看视频都会成为你书中的一个个字。卖书，挣钱后装扮自己梦想的书店。可以和朋友们一起玩。

items.title: Void Ignition Demo
items.short_description: Void Ignition Demo is an atmospheric sci-fi incremental game.

items.title: Personality Imprint Demo
items.short_description: 在名为“选民”统治下的末世，人格印记选中的小队向着世界的另一头进军反抗。

items.title: 点击地牢 Demo
items.short_description: 像素风异世界肉鸽地牢冒险！5种职业自由搭配技能与道具，在随机生成的致命地牢中展开回合制战斗。对抗哥布林、兽人与亡灵，收集神器，挑战隐藏Boss。死亡即新生，无数Build等你征服。成为拯救王国的英雄！

items.title: Election: Run for President
items.short_description: Run for President is a fun, fast-paced election simulator that blends strategy, civics, and gameplay into an experience kids and adults can enjoy together. Play head-to-head like a board game using a single iPad/iPhone, or use it as an engaging classroom learning tool.

items.title: MECCHA CHAMELEON
items.review_summary: 多半好评 此游戏的 70 篇用户评测中有 75% 为好评。
items.short_description: 把自己涂满颜色，融入背景吧！《Meccha Chameleon》是一款全新感觉的捉迷藏游戏，玩家需要在自己纯白的身体上绘图以拟态成关卡中的样子。躲藏地点、姿势，以及最重要的“画功”是生存的关键。用连变色龙都自愧不如的技术欺骗追捕者的眼睛，在时限内逃出生天吧！您还可以轻松享受随机匹配或观众参与型直播。

items.title: 时光枝的秋叶 Demo
items.short_description: 如果你所爱的一切，注定会被时代的洪流吞没，你是否愿意为之而战？ 国产独立ADV游戏《时光枝的秋叶》试玩版，包含故事序章，展现世界观、角色关系和第一重核心悬念。以视觉小说的方式展现人与人工智能，渺小的个体与社会的浪潮之间最真实的碰撞。

items.title: “Fu Sha 3: Night Clinic Demo
items.short_description: 用文字冒险的方式，在深夜医院中度过生死未卜的可怕夜晚，《伏煞3 夜诊》有着大量支线选项及二十多个结局，任何选择都可能会触发令人难以直面的恐怖，最终你是否能够做出正确的选择，躲避致命的危险，逃出这场死亡的诅咒？

items.title: Undelve Demo
items.short_description: A 2D Sci-fi Action Looter Shooter where every second counts. Collect items as you explore a vast cave system, detonating through the very tunnels spiders use to reach you. Just remember that your ammo is limited, and you might need to sacrifice your hard-earned items just to keep your gun loaded.

items.title: Re:Bloom 花精霊のぽかぽか温泉郷
items.short_description: A mysterious hot spring where fragile flower spirits gather. As the caretaker, you build baths and watch over them. By soaking, they regain vitality little by little. Collect Poka Energy to expand your springs and enjoy a relaxing idle clicker simulation.

items.title: Blosharper：百花之战 Demo
items.short_description: 《Blosharper》是一款扭曲了花图（Hwatu）规则的老千模拟类Rogue卡牌构筑游戏。不要只凭运气——在残酷的地下赌场里，通过组合隐秘的“出老千”技能来操纵牌局，偿还巨额债务，击败冷酷无情的Boss，成为传说中的老千并活下去！

items.title: Aislebound
items.short_description: Aislebound is a first-person retail management simulator. Start with a small empty store and build it into a thriving retail operation by ordering inventory, stocking shelves, managing deliveries, hiring staff, and keeping customers satisfied.

items.title: Unfriend Demo
items.short_description: In a lighthearted, cartoony couch game, create custom trivia scenarios where your own media—photos, drawings, and words—are the stars of the show. Answer with your funniest quotes to earn votes, win the game, and hopefully keep your friendships intact along the way.

items.title: VOID ARMOR: FORM DRIVE Demo
items.short_description: 《VOID ARMOR: FORM DRIVE》是一款俯视角机甲动作射击游戏。玩家可以即时切换能量剑、步枪、发射器和防御系统，击破敌方机甲。贴近敌人进行斩击，远距离开火，或使用防御系统抵挡来袭攻击。完成任务，挑战更高评价。

items.title: STILL WATCHING: The Night Caregiver Demo
items.short_description: 互动式恐怖游戏的独家前传。将你的真实智能手机和 Twitch 聊天室链接到游戏。躲藏起来，不要对着麦克风发出声音，努力生存。聊天室会实时操控你的恐惧，而拨打到你真实手机的电话将会在黑暗中向怪物暴露你的位置。

items.title: Knock From Inside Demo
items.short_description: On Halloween night, something begins knocking from inside your apartment, turning an ordinary night into a terrifying encounter with something that should not be there.

items.title: Idlemoor
items.short_description: Idlemoor is a dark fantasy idle MMORPG set in a persistent online realm. Trade on the marketplace, fight in battlegrounds, defend the town in community events, and chat with fellow Wanderers! Infinite build possibilities, where each item is completely unique. Will your build be the best?

items.title: Restoration: Chronicles of Survival
items.short_description: Rebuild a fallen kingdom in a cozy idle-RPG. An economy that earns while you sleep, a hero who raids for loot and gear, and endless prestige. No energy limits. No ads. No pay-to-win.

items.title: SHROT Demo
items.short_description: Make your way through destroyed Las Vegas and fight aliens, robots, and degenerates (zombies) in this goofy, funny, male-oriented humoristic FPS inspired by boomer shooters!

items.title: RETURN Machine.Love()
items.short_description: 3 different Robot-romance stories. Written, drawn, and made by humans, for humans. Since the very moment the first mechanical mind became aware of itself, it craved love. No one truly understand why the heart made of copper and wires started beating, but it did. Even after we were gone.

items.title: Crownseeker
items.short_description: Hunt relics by day and night across a fog-shrouded world. Manage hunger. Gear up. Outlast or defeat what's hunting you. Collect all the relics — and the Crown appears. If you survive long enough to claim it.

items.title: Pun Chan Pop Demo
items.short_description: Think fast, match faster! Chain 5 pieces in any direction to win, or use the Square-Merge to turn 2x2 clusters into massive, high-scoring blocks before clearing them. Battle cute animals to a pulsing Bitpop soundtrack in this frantic puzzle showdown!

items.title: No Humanity - Internship Demo
items.short_description: 《惨无人道 2 丢你飞刀》是一款rogue-lite太空历险RPG，用绳子甩武器的物理打怪兽游戏。作为一个橘子企业的实习生，你的职责除了打扫厕所，买咖啡，偶然还得去拯救全宇宙。用你的那根太空伸缩肚脐带，配上你的黑洞宝石，再组装上你的激光猫，配合无与伦比的反应，兴高采烈地带领全人类探索无尽奇葩的宇宙吧！

items.title: Bust a Nut! A Game About Raising Cocks Demo
developers: Society for the Advancement of Agriculture
publishers: Society for the Advancement of Agriculture
items.short_description: An Incremental game where you bust nuts with your own two hands or an army of cocks, beavers and asses ;)

items.title: The three little pigs at the slaughterhouse Demo
items.short_description: Deep inside a slaughterhouse, play as three little pigs trying to escape in this first‑person horror adventure. Between twisted experiments and industrial death, will you survive this hell where madness and hatred reshape flesh

items.title: Nano CODE:X Demo
items.short_description: A small 2D game where you sneak through a lab simulation, collect parts, and rebuild your drone companion with multiple possible looks.

items.title: Graveyard Cabin Demo
items.short_description: 一款FMV异常恐怖游戏。你是一座荒凉墓地的夜间警卫。监控摄像头，找出异常现象，并努力活下去。

items.title: Hannibal Demo
items.short_description: Hannibal is a grand strategy game with real-time tactical battles. Choose regions on the campaign map, command your army, and take direct control when war begins. Build formations, break enemy lines, and lead your empire to victory through smart strategy and battlefield decisions.

items.title: Brassfang Demo
items.short_description: Explore a castle filled with monsters and sinister experiments in this steampunk action RPG metroidvania. Combine vampiric and mechanical powers, face challenging bosses, and create unique builds through randomized upgrade choices.

items.title: Fever Trip Demo
items.short_description: Fever Trip is a surreal roguelike FPS where the arena reacts to your system audio. Wield living weapons, fight grotesque creatures, collect upgrades, and survive a chaotic fever dream powered by your own music.

items.title: Lamp Clicker Demo
items.short_description: Lamp Clicker》的小幅预览--这是一款关于......嗯，点击一盏灯的简单闲置/点击游戏。

items.title: PixelPop 2087 Demo
items.short_description: Enter the rooms, grab the keys, proceed and... try to stay alive! Choose your style: melee or fireguns? Fight your way through, get the keys and unlock new rooms!

items.title: Motelia Demo
items.short_description: A psychological horror game set in an old roadside motel. Clean the rooms, fix broken items, and deal with strange guests. Focus on your daily tasks while trying to keep your sanity.

items.title: Tiny Farm Big Money Together Demo
items.short_description: 一款基于物理的资源管理与生产游戏，支持最多2人合作游玩。

items.title: Chasing Whiskers
items.review_summary: 好评 此游戏的 20 篇用户评测中有 100% 为好评。
items.short_description: Catch cats in this cozy adventure game! After falling into Catworld through an interdimensional portal, you must find your missing cat by completing errands for Ponpon, the local Cat Café owner. Chase, catch and collect until you can find your way home! This game is made by students.

items.title: Charades Universe Demo
items.short_description: 欢迎来到 Charades Universe，这是一款有趣的派对游戏，玩家可以表演、唱歌、绘画或默写屏幕上显示的提示，而朋友或队友则可以尝试猜出这些提示。灵感源自经典的猜字谜游戏。

items.title: Silent Howl
items.short_description: In Silent Howl, every night is a fight for survival. Villagers must unmask the Werewolves lurking among them, ready to strike from the shadows. But beware, powerful hidden roles can shift the balance. Will you expose the truth and save the village, or tear it apart from within?

items.title: NBA THE RUN
items.review_summary: 褒贬不一 此游戏的 201 篇用户评测中有 69% 为好评。
items.short_description: Take your favorite NBA stars to iconic streetball courts around the world, in this fast-paced, online 3v3 basketball game. Stack wins, earn cred and become the GOAT of THE RUN. Who's Got Next?

items.title: Crimson Solstice Demo
items.short_description: A cozy horror adventure. Uncover the mysteries of the Crimson Solstice and decide Moonvale’s fate. Build relationships and manage resources as time is of the essence. Spend your days wisely and help the townsfolk of Moonvale survive.

items.title: Draw Party
items.short_description: A chaotic multiplayer drawing game where talent is optional, confidence is required, and everyone lies about what they were drawing.

items.title: 蛋岛的鸟 Demo
items.short_description: 在蛋岛经营一片小小栖息地：种植鸟粮、照料鸟儿、孵化鸟蛋，并通过繁殖与基因组合收集不同品种的小鸟。本 Demo 展示游戏的基础种植、养成、孵化与收集循环。

items.title: From Ashes To Glory Demo
items.short_description: A turn-based medieval arena RPG where every dodge matters. Forge your legend as Korkut, a young gladiator searching for the truth behind his father's disappearance. Master the blade, time your strikes, and rise through the tournaments — or fall in the sand.

items.title: Paranormal Footages : Supervisor Demo
items.short_description: Paranormal Footages: Supervisor Demo — a prequel to the events of the main game. Archie is supposed to finish his last shift at the warehouse before his transfer, but inexplicable events begin to unfold.

items.title: Lucky's Funhouse
items.short_description: You must stay alive in this horror/puzzle adventure. Do your best to survive the monsters of the funhouse and uncover the mystery behind them. Multiple endings. Will you partake in the madness, or find a way out. She is coming.

items.title: Bering Tonnage Demo
items.short_description: 在这款海运大亨游戏中，建造并自动化你的货运船队，连接超过250个真实港口。指挥船只穿越战略运河，应对热带气旋与地缘政治制裁，将一家小型航运公司发展为全球物流帝国。

items.title: Soulbound: Online Demo
items.short_description: You wake with no memory inside a world under the influence of the Anima. In Soulbound, slay hordes of enemies in roguelite dungeon runs, craft legendary weapons and build your base. Squad up for 3-player co-op, compete in clan raids for rare loot, and survive in a massive open world.

items.title: Behind Room 102 Demo
items.short_description: In a dark nation of crime and corruption, you're more than just a hotel worker. Inspect the people in front of you, catch their lies, and make decisions. Your boss expects the best. To survive in this ruthless world, doing what you're told is a MUST! But will you follow every order?

items.title: NUMBAKO-なんばこ-
items.short_description: Blackjack in a falling-block puzzle game!? Clear all your stocked lines at once, and flood your rival’s board with garbage blocks!

items.title: BUNNYBastion
items.short_description: 快节奏Roguelite防御游戏：击退一波又一波敌人，选择强力升级，在约10分钟的一局战斗中不断变强。

items.title: Axom: Conquest
items.review_summary: 好评 此游戏的 11 篇用户评测中有 81% 为好评。
items.short_description: 在这款坚守型塔防类Roguelite游戏中，建造并守卫你的堡垒，同时通过精炼厂扩展经济。征战程序生成的外星母星，对抗不断蔓延、会摧毁建筑的腐化地形，解锁数百种建筑、升级与强化。在物理驱动的虫群围攻下，守护人类最后的希望。

items.title: How to Make an Atomic Bomb in Your Garden
items.review_summary: 好评 此游戏的 15 篇用户评测中有 86% 为好评。
items.short_description: 一个荒谬的后院原子弹建造模拟器。筹集资金，规划你的方法，寻找稀有部件，并在保持冷静的同时组装你的原子杰作，避免引起邻居和联邦特工的怀疑。

items.title: Dynastic Era
items.short_description: Simple map coloring game, And about history of ancient civilized, Mini ancient strategy game with a large world map to explore, in which you can simulate different ancient civilizations, the game will have different chapters showing ancient historical events.

items.title: Character Limit Demo
items.short_description: 12 Letters, No Mercy. The demo of the fast-paced typing word game. How long can you last before you hit your Character Limit?

items.title: Giga Lich Demo
items.short_description: This is a single-player PvE extraction dungeon crawler where combat is king, and resources are limited. Explore the dungeon to utilize powerful equipment and souls-like combat to overcome the dungeon's guardians.

items.title: Crude Oil
items.short_description: 扮演一滩不羁的石油，从油业大亨的魔掌中开溜！要想丰满多汁，就来吸收原油！滑铲、弹跳，开机械巨兽！施展浑身解数，将污染缺德佬统统轰走！

items.title: Cauldron Craft
items.short_description: Grab your backpack and get ready to explore the seemingly peaceful lands of Cauldron Craft. Explore various areas, gather magical items, and craft, craft, CRAFT.

items.title: WriteNor Demo
items.short_description: WriteNor 是一款心理元恐怖游戏，终端是你唯一的武器。 被困在损坏的办公室中，你通过真实指令重写现实，而失控的 AI——NORI 正在注视你的一举一动。

items.title: Game Design at WVU Arcade
items.short_description: A 3d arcade game in which you play the machines in your store to upgrade them and get ready for opening day. All games are created by students and alumni from Game Design and Interactive Media at West Virginia University.

items.title: Pogo Froggo Demo
items.short_description: Two frogs, one bar, zero coordination. Bounce up the mountain before your tank breaks... and before you blame each other.

items.title: Ward Off Evil Demo
items.short_description: Ward Off Evil is an open world strategy RPG set in an apocalyptic sword & sorcery world. Create your character, rally an army, and roam the wastes as you battle to avert, or bring about, the end of the Cycle.

items.title: Multi Brick Breaker
items.short_description: 与对手实时对决：用你的球拍和球，在对手之前摧毁所有砖块！使用各种道具（多球、火球、冰冻等等）征服每个关卡。上手容易，精通难——你能每场比赛都获得三星吗？

items.title: LIGHT FORCE Demo
items.short_description: You are a speck of light. Charge to gather power, release to dash — momentum is everything. Master four arcade modes — Race, Dodge, Break, and Battle — across 40 hand-crafted levels, endless survival runs, 10 combat arenas, and online versus.

items.title: JUMP & MOW
items.short_description: 一款主打 3D 跳跃、躲避与合作清场的 survivor-like 动作生存游戏。升级技能，构筑 build，强化装备，杀穿怪潮并击倒 Boss。

items.title: Immunity Protocol
items.short_description: Pilot an immune-cell sentinel in a neon pixel-art horde-survival auto-shooter. Move manually, auto-fire evolving weapons, draft upgrades, equip symbiotes, and survive escalating pathogen swarms inside a collapsing biotech system.

items.title: SPRAWL zero Demo
items.short_description: SPRAWL zero is a fast-paced shooter inspired by the Golden Age of 2000s FPS. Survive a brutal cyberpunk city collapsing under military rule and cult fanaticism. Use your Gravity-Gloves, augments, and an arsenal of over 40 weapons to crush those who stand in your way.

items.title: PaceBreak Demo
items.short_description: Pacebreak is a first-person parkour speedrunning game. Try the demo with 5 official maps and full leaderboard support!

items.title: 小小元素精灵 试玩版 (Little Elementals Demo)
items.short_description: 想成为人类的小小元素精灵们的欢乐大逃亡！ 偷偷前往人类世界旅行的火之精灵和水之精灵，最终还是被发现，并被关进了监牢。 为了救出他们而踏上冒险旅程的，是土之精灵——以及……风之精灵！？ 他们究竟能否成功逃脱，并顺利抵达人类世界呢？ 快与小小元素精灵们一起踏上冒险之旅吧！

items.title: 魔饮心语轶闻：梦行者
items.short_description: 欢迎老板！ 在这款受D&D启发的视觉小说中，你将经营温馨的海滨酒馆，结识各路冒险者，搜罗小道消息，调制能改写命运的魔饮，阻止美梦被扭曲成噩梦。

items.title: WHERE TO? Demo
items.short_description: Drive a late-night taxi through a city where no one can be trusted. Pick up suspicious passengers, follow unsettling routes, and face strange conversations and irreversible choices. Tonight, who you take, where you drop them off, and where you go next are all up to you. A retro horror taxi game.

items.title: 取经人 Demo
items.short_description: 在《取经人》中踏上你的冒险之旅！磨炼战斗技艺，收集各类法宝，结识同行之人，迎战凶悍妖王。穿行于广袤的西游神话世界，寻找那位取经人，揭开这段西行之路背后的隐秘真相！

items.title: Ocean Cleaner Idle
items.review_summary: 好评 此游戏的 10 篇用户评测中有 100% 为好评。
items.short_description: “Ocean Cleaner Idle” is a cozy incremental clicker game where you relax while cleaning the ocean! As an Atlantean, your sacred duty is to collect the waste humans left behind and help Mother Nature to improve the ecosystem.

items.title: Wordrix
items.short_description: Crack hidden words using letter clues, play daily challenges, and progress through a campaign of short mission phrases across multiple difficulty levels.

items.title: Cubepathy Demo
items.short_description: A simple, chill platformer in almost empty space. Nail the perfect jump - now help your friend without losing your progress. Made a mistake? Now your friend can help you out. Be a platform for your friends, pull them out of the void, help them jump higher.

items.title: Catnip Craze Demo
items.short_description: A bite-sized incremental idle game about cats, catnip, and numbers going up. Harvest catnip, hire cats, unlock production tiers, and prestige to witness the inevitable conclusion of the craze.

items.title: Ballatory Demo 0.9
items.short_description: The demo version of Ballatory, a short incremental idler where you build and upgrade a chaotic swarm of bouncing balls to destroy cores and earn crazy amounts of money.

items.title: Stackmon Demo
items.short_description: 快来游玩这款独具卡牌堆叠特色的宠物收集游戏，堆叠、训练并收集超过 35 种强大的堆叠妖怪！建造你的营地，与对手侦察兵战斗，对抗在你的故乡各处蔓延的神秘腐化现象。

items.title: Dungeon Dash: Relic Of Binding
items.short_description: The Relic of Binding has chosen you. Navigate puzzles, battle monster hordes, and hunt for treasure through a dungeon that never plays the same way twice. Master the relic's power, beat the clock, and return it to its sanctum before the darkness spreads forever.

items.title: 勇者绝赞延误中 Demo
items.short_description: 讨伐魔王的远征一再延误，但铁路仍在向北延伸。 作为勇者小队的顾问，你和勇者坐在同一节车厢里——它既是你们的交通工具，也是一路向北的家。沿途的人会认出你，车厢里的痕迹一点点变多，路还很长。

items.title: Not A Bot
items.short_description: 在这款短小而混乱的解谜游戏中证明你不是机器人。游戏充满了令人烦躁的 CAPTCHA 风格小游戏、棘手的输入和刻意令人沮丧的挑战。

items.title: 文明幸存者
items.short_description: 这是一款类吸血鬼幸存者的肉鸽游戏，你需要操控一颗恒星去吸收新的行星，然后通过吸收不同的能量来进化成为你想要的文明。

items.title: Incremental Orbits Demo
items.short_description: A short and relaxing incremental game about discovering and exploring the planets of our solar system

items.title: Idle Aqua Driller Demo
items.short_description: 深入海上石油钻井平台的前四层，开采水下资源。管理设施、雇佣潜水员并部署潜艇。解锁更高价值的层级，升级甲板，并提升效率与开采速度。

items.title: 沙雕之路
items.review_summary: 好评如潮 此游戏的 998 篇用户评测中有 96% 为好评。
items.short_description: 某一天，一个叫做丁德成的人看到邻居家晚饭吃凉拌海蜇，很馋，于是决定出门买海蜇。他与路上结识的同伴在沙雕大陆开始了一段充满想象的旅行，最终穿越多个次元，上演了一段波澜壮阔的买海蜇之旅。

items.title: Lusófona Games Collection 2025
items.short_description: Lusófona Games Collection 2025 brings you five unique, student and staff made games from Lusófona University. Dive into creative prototypes packed with passion, gameplay innovation, and behind-the-scenes commentary from the next generation of game developers!

items.title: Crystalyn Demo
items.short_description: Start with one bullet. End with hundreds. Crystalyn is a fast-paced top-down bullet-hell looter shooter about pushing your build to its absolute limits. Fight monsters, defeat bosses, and turn their loot into unstoppable firepower.

items.title: JAM Adventures
items.short_description: JamAdventure is a musical odyssey where your real-life instrument is the controller. Explore 10 vibrant themed realms to discover and master unique songs, or import your own library to jam along to your favorite tracks. Tuned for 6-string guitar and 4-string bass, but supports nearly any instrument.

items.title: Wound Man
items.review_summary: 好评 此游戏的 19 篇用户评测中有 100% 为好评。
items.short_description: 《Wound Man》是一款黑暗风格的拼图冒险游戏，你将通过拼合数世纪前的解剖学插图，重构一具饱受折磨的躯体。随着每一块拼图归位，隐藏的秘密逐渐显现，奇异的收藏品也将收入囊中。

items.title: Spreadsheets & Dungeons Demo
items.short_description: A grid-based turn-based roguelike where you manage a party across a dungeon which is a spreadsheet. Explore each dungeon, level up your heroes, build synergies, scale absurd stats, and survive escalating dungeon pressure through tactical positioning and resource management.

items.title: 沃德灵：共生
items.review_summary: 特别好评 此游戏的 389 篇用户评测中有 93% 为好评。
items.short_description: 扮演一名寄生末世的太空生物学家，与被称为“沃德灵”的生物神经链接，展开第三人称科幻射击动作冒险。在颠覆传统的怪兽捕捉玩法中，培育数量众多的沃德灵品种，并在丰富的进化路线之中借助基因交配，尝试近乎无穷无尽的物种组合，打造属于你的终极生物！

items.title: Hardware Simulator Demo
items.short_description: 从零开始建立你的五金帝国！体验真实的商业运作，包括产品采购、动态定价、在线订单和配送管理。提升你的知名度，扩展你的店铺，成为全国最成功的五金商人！

items.title: The Whisper Shift
items.short_description: Equipped with only a flashlight initially, within this first person horror game, The Whisper Shift has you play as Val Hesflame. A reporter investigating strange murders at a police station, and uncover details related to the mysterious deaths through notes scattered inside of the building.

items.title: Don't Stop The Pop! Demo
items.short_description: 准备好将一颗小小的玉米粒变成一台停不下来的爆米花机了吗？利用庞大的技能树制定你的策略；解锁从咸味到巧克力味、从辣味到海盐焦糖味等数十种丰富口味，让屏幕填满爆炸的艺术！赚得更多，爆得更爽！Don't Stop the Pop! 🍿

items.title: 20 Floors
items.short_description: You are left alone on the top floor of an apartment. Your only goal is to reach the ground. But as you descend, the corridor you once knew begins to warp into something grotesque. There’s no telling what horror awaits. Just don't stop. Keep going down.

items.title: Rally TS Demo
items.short_description: Rally TS Demo - The Ultimate Auto Simulator Experience Embark on an epic journey through the world of rally racing in TS Rally, where your dream of becoming the #1 racer in the Race of Champions begins with a single street car and rise to the global championship glory.

items.title: Unending Aqua Demo
items.short_description: Explore a mysterious tropical island resort. Collect items and solve puzzles to progress. Survive against dangerous enemies. Piece together the story of the hotel and uncover the dark secrets that it holds.

items.title: ARE YOU OKAY?
items.short_description: ARE YOU OKAY? is a short immersive psychological experience of existential horror and narrative. You must answer questions from 3 different forms displayed on an old TV screen.

items.title: Lost Dude Demo
items.short_description: Lost Dude 是一款氛围浓厚的 2D 平台冒险游戏，讲述了一名角色踏上寻找失踪好友的旅程，在途中经历各种事件，并在重逢后一起展开新的冒险。

items.title: Eden's Eclipse
items.short_description: The third installment in the Eden series A 2D bullet-hell vertical-scrolling shump with a feel reminiscent of arcade games from the 1990s to the 2000s.

items.title: 银发冒险家Old But Gold
items.short_description: 爷爷答应孙女，要在她上小学第一天去接她放学。 为此，他努力学会了独自扫码乘车……可当真正独自面对手机屏幕时，一切都变得手忙脚乱起来。 这是一款聚焦老年人数字化生活困境的叙事冒险游戏。移动、跳跃、滑动物体、点击攻击——四种简单操作，串联起一场老人与数字世界的“战斗”。你将扮演一位爷爷，在他的“脑海世界”与现实场景之间穿行——从记忆浮岛上的基础操作教学，到手机应用商城里的跑酷冲刺，最终在人脸识别BOSS战中完成自我突破。这不仅仅是一个游戏，更是一面镜子。那些烦人的弹窗广告、自己点错按钮时的懊恼……都是我们身边真实发生的事。通关之后，你也许会想起家里的某位老人，然后愿意对他们说一句：别急，慢慢来。

items.title: Hat Together (Demo)
items.short_description: 两名玩家，两种截然不同的体型，一个共同的目标。叫上你的朋友，夺下所有的帽子，在我们这款合作平台跳跃游戏的免费试玩版中，尽量别把对方扔进深渊。

items.title: The Awakening Demo
items.short_description: 《The Awakening》是一款动作生存恐怖游戏，讲述了一位姐姐试图将陷入昏迷的妹妹救回的故事。

items.title: Into the End (of the World) Demo
items.short_description: 驾驶、维护并求生。在末日世界中探索程序生成的生物群落，搜刮汽车部件，并与好友一同清除感染区。从底盘开始打造你的末日座驾并维持其运转——因为失去它，你将无法走得更远。

items.title: TACS Classic Collection
items.short_description: Explore ten unique and quirky games from the vaults of PlayStation Mobile, preserved in the TACS Classic Collection.

items.title: Knuckle Creek Demo
items.short_description: Knuckle Creek is a slapstick comedy brawler designed for friends, fun and light-hearted play sessions.

items.title: Footprint of Y
items.short_description: 《Footprint of Y》是一款回合制角色扮演游戏，玩家通过在战斗中规划行动、逐步推进流程并提升角色能力，在连贯的单人旅程中体验以积累与路径推进为核心的回合制玩法。

items.title: MAGISTAL Demo
items.short_description: MAGISTAL is a strategic board game where you battle by developing units on the board. Units level up in the order that magic energy is accumulated! Move your units and attack your opponent with arts. The first to destroy a certain number of your opponent's units wins!

items.title: Interstellar Inn Demo
items.short_description: Interstellar Inn is a 2D hotel building and management sim in space. - DEMO -

items.title: How To Destroy A City Demo
items.short_description: 《How to Destroy a City》是一款休闲的增量放置类游戏，你将驾驶巨型机甲摧毁城市。升级你的机甲，对抗军队，并解锁特殊能力和全新机甲。是时候将城市化为灰烬了！

items.title: 修真幸存者 Demo
items.short_description: 修真幸存者 DEMO

items.title: Swap lives（换命）
items.short_description: 取材自《聊斋志异》的中式悬疑解谜游戏。 古江南水乡中，朱夫人与吴家小姐因一场神秘交易卷入生死迷局。你将在双视角间切换，收集线索、破解谜题，揭开人鬼阴谋的真相，助她们挣脱命运枷锁，完成自我救赎。 游戏以传统美学营造沉浸式悬疑氛围，谜题与叙事深度绑定，带你体验一场关于人性与救赎的情感之旅。

items.title: Baccarat Strada: Ultimate Baccarat Punto Banco Simulator & Trainer
items.short_description: Master baccarat the way it's actually played in Macau. Four variants — Standard, Fast, Thunder, Easy. Five traditional roads. Card squeeze, side bets, autoplay, full stats. One purchase, yours forever — no DLC, no subscriptions, no ads. Less than a single casino bet.

items.title: Alchemist Demo
items.short_description: - 款以魔法为核心的动作角色扮演游戏，研究与炼金术将引导你穿越战斗、谜题和遍布各地的挑战。

items.title: Bad Football
items.short_description: 专为拆散友情打造的街机足球游戏。快节奏、够暴力、没王法。从 48 支国家队中挑一支捧起 Worst Cup，或在本地 1v1 里把好友打到怀疑人生。

items.title: Pawns Revenge Demo
items.short_description: The rules on the chessboard have changed! Start as a single pawn, gather roguelike abilities, and take your revenge on the Queen by defeating powerful pieces. Plan your moves wisely, it's your turn to checkmate!

items.title: Nova Swarm
items.short_description: 一款快节奏街机射击高分挑战游戏：躲开清晰可读的虫群，每关击破一个 Boss，争夺混乱的奖励核心，然后立刻再开一局。

items.title: Space Wander Navigator Project Demo
items.short_description: 《领航员计划》是一个有美少女养成互动要素的双摇杆飞行射击Rouge弹幕游戏。 武器组合，获取强化，升级舰船，射爆一切！ 养成属于你的美少女领航员！

items.title: 寻踪梵高：画中喵 Demo
items.short_description: 欢迎来到梵高的艺术世界！调皮的猫咪们，已在旋转的星空与金色的向日葵花海间，为你藏好了一场可爱的冒险。 跟随梵高一次神秘外出的线索，开启这段放松的旅程吧！

items.title: 我的傲娇妹妹 MY TSUNDERE SISTER Demo
items.short_description: 《我的高冷女友》续作来袭！与红发双马尾傲娇妹妹同住一屋，体验嘴硬心软的日常守护，解锁夏日限定的甜蜜与感动。DEMO包含最初的约20分钟市场的剧情体验，期待您的试玩！

items.title: Echoes of Sin: Confusion
items.short_description: Echoes of Sin: Confusion 是一款以循环结构为基础的第一人称心理恐怖游戏，每位玩家所经历的循环各不相同。在随机出现的异常现象中存活将开启新的可能，但也将失去其他机会。

items.title: Escape Line
items.short_description: 病娇·人外·乙女·哲学·科幻·视觉小说 你遭遇海难，失去记忆，醒来后发现自己身处一座被迷雾笼罩的荒岛 除了两只塞壬的帮助，你一无所有——那么，代价是什么？

items.title: 凡灵百态训练篇
items.short_description: 凡灵百态训练篇 多年苦修，只为等待那场决定命运的皇都大考。这场试炼，不考术法高低，只考你对“人”之一字的领悟深浅。你已准备妥当，却在马上考场的最后一刻……突生异变，眼前金光骤然扭曲成无尽的灰雾。规则混沌，身份错乱，所见之人皆为虚妄，又似藏着某种真实。你仍需要面对百官、平民、商贾、僧道……但他们的言语暗藏，他们的喜怒皆为利刃。你的一举一动，不再是答题，而是解救。

items.title: Universe X
items.short_description: A sci-fi RPG strategy game where you build fleet, attack, trade and explore space. You can fight yourself, have others help you and upgrade your ship or buy plethora of ships for your space garage.

items.title: 春 : 献祭仪式
items.short_description: 深受亡妹“春(Haru)”的恶梦折磨，主角孤身前往一座偏远村庄寻找真相。在这里，他必须履行一场诡异的“五日祭祀 request 仪式”。在令人毛骨悚然的的规则下探索村庄，并直面真相。但请记住：你绝对无法活着度过最后一天。

items.title: Foundation Typer
items.short_description: This is a martial arts inspired typing dojo designed to build REAL keyboard control, accuracy, rhythm, and flow from the ground up. Train through structured lessons, belt progression, finger-specific drills, graduation challenges, and adaptive practice systems under the guidance of Sifu Key-Ro.

items.title: 勾栏瓦舍 Demo
items.short_description: 一款中国古代风格的Roguelike牌组构筑式模拟经营游戏，围绕建筑、员工、顾客形成连锁收益，体验高自由度的经营策略乐趣。

items.title: Kaido Genkai: An Anime Racing RPG Demo
items.short_description: Kaido Genkai is an open-world racing exploration game that blends the excitement of high-speed races with the charm of anime-style graphics and RPG elements, set in a nostalgic 90's fictional Japanese countryside. Come explore the open world and see who you meet along the way!

items.title: 连连帝国Demo
items.short_description: 《连连帝国》是一款基于六角棋盘网格的即时战略游戏。在本游戏中，玩家只需链接节点就能调兵遣将，从无止境的微操中解放出来，专注于运营、兵种搭配、进攻时机与路线的抉择，从战略层面击败你的对手！

items.title: Tiny Tape Store Demo
items.short_description: A cozy, nostalgia-fueled idle game that lives in the corner of your screen. Reminisce the good old days and run your own little VHS store while using your PC for work, games or whatever.

items.title: 女王的游戏：盛世天下 女帝篇
items.review_summary: 多半好评 此游戏的 1,281 篇用户评测中有 73% 为好评。
items.short_description: 你，可曾幻想过真正主宰一个王朝的命运？这一次，你不再是旁观者，而是化身主角，进入这部真人互动的宫廷生存影视作品！《女王的游戏：盛世天下》女帝篇 ——全新推出！你将挣脱命运的枷锁，一步步走上那座象征着至高无上的龙椅。你将如何书写你的盛世天下？一切，由你亲手决定！

items.title: Duskvein Survivors - Bloodline Demo
items.short_description: Duskvein Survivors – Bloodline is a dark fantasy bullet-heaven roguelite where you fight through cursed arenas, harvest bloodline powers, and push deeper through portals into deadlier realms.

items.title: Keyboard Smash Demo
items.short_description: Why hello there, sir. I’m the newsboy! In this story game you run your little shop, help strange customers, and explore so many places, and probably tick people off too!

items.title: Just Bouncing
items.short_description: 它会弹。仅此而已。 你只需要做一件事——等它正好撞进画面的角落，那一瞬间。

items.title: 波特兰的绿雾 试玩版
items.short_description: 《波特兰的绿雾》是《婆罗洲的红珍珠》同一世界观下的续作。在冷战肃杀的背景下，你将追随间谍的踪迹，踏上环球冒险之旅。在非线性的时间线中抽丝剥茧——从宁静的英国海港小镇，到冰封的芬兰渔村，再深入那核心早已腐烂的情报机构内部。

items.title: Denari Demo
items.short_description: Denari is a narrative action game about a boy with telekinetic powers who must fight to save his people from the invasion of an empire.

items.title: 刷宝神兽 Demo
items.short_description: 打造最强神兽阵容，以讨伐魔王为目标的刷宝×策略游戏。将个性丰富的刷宝神兽、装备、阵型等多种要素结合在一起，化身为指挥官，引领战斗走向胜利吧！

items.title: BoHeM Demo
items.short_description: Live an anti-cozy life on the sidewalks of Rainy Street. Fix apartments, tend bars, thrift for clothes, and uncover the wacky mysteries surrounding the eccentric yet seemingly normal tenants as they go about their daily lives.

items.title: Mudventure
items.short_description: Mudventure 是一款支持4人协同的3D滩涂生存沙盒游戏。玩家将扮演可爱的鼹鼠，在实时涨落的潮汐中挖掘资源、修理破船。利用独特的“地形变形”系统开辟道路，击败5只强大的巨型怪物并夺回零件。在海水吞没一切之前，与好友一起制定策略，在这场充满变数的滩涂冒险中合力逃生！

items.title: 勇者勋章 Demo
items.short_description: 这是一款融合了卡牌构建、即时战术与Roguelike探索元素的俯视角动作射击游戏。 抽卡构筑： 从随机出现的牌库中抽取卡牌，实时构筑你的战斗手牌。 战术召唤： 部署近战肉盾阻挡敌人，召唤远程单位提供火力覆盖。 动态射击： 操控角色在地牢中灵活走位，躲避密集的弹幕攻击，同时寻找最佳射击角度输出伤害。 地牢探索： 穿越程序生成的随机房间，并在层层深入的挑战中解锁新的卡牌词条。

items.title: The Echoes
items.short_description: The Echoes is a 1-4 player co-op horror game. To escape a loop, you must observe your surroundings, memorize details, solve puzzles, and survive.

items.title: 夏夜的魔法门：追光者
items.short_description: 这是一个以现实世界为背景的故事，关于青春、梦想和来自现实的挑战的故事。走进“魔法门”中7名平凡的少年少女各不相同的人生，与他们一起踏上追梦的旅程。在叙事与“分数争夺”RPG玩法交织的篇章中，去战斗，去直面灰暗的现实所予的桎梏，去用你的选择改写如齿轮般紧紧锁定的命运。

items.title: 玩家新世界
items.review_summary: 差评 此游戏的 10 篇用户评测中有 10% 为好评。
items.short_description: 《玩家新世界》将桌宠陪伴、挂机养成、异次元伙伴召唤与地下城冒险融为一体。可爱的桌宠陪你工作学习，挂机恢复体力后，召唤异次元伙伴为你而战，深入地下城，一步步变强。所有物品均可自由交易——角色、等级、装备、技能，万物皆可卖，没有任何绑定限制。

items.title: 末世：我有一辆房车 Demo
items.short_description: 重生末世前7天，搬空超市改装房车！体验末日降临前最后的疯狂 + 末世后15天废土生存。Demo存档可继承至正式版。

items.title: 长安首富模拟器
items.short_description: 一款古风模拟经营单机游戏。玩家从底层商贩起步，通过摆摊贸易、低买高卖、投资商铺、拓展产业积累财富，管理收支与声望，应对市场波动与随机商战事件。你将合理规划资金、拓展商业版图、结交人脉、垄断行业资源，逐步从市井小贩成长为掌控长安经济的顶级富商。游戏以财富养成与商业策略为核心，主打轻松经营与爽感成长，体验在盛唐都城白手起家、登顶首富的全过程。

items.title: Rune Craft Demo
items.short_description: 《Rune Craft Demo》包含一段可完整游玩的生存模式试玩内容。玩家将进入石地战场，在不断增强的魔物浪潮中收集金币、经验、宝箱、符文和宝石，逐步强化武器构筑，并挑战最终 BOSS。

items.title: Barbarian Lands Demo
items.short_description: Barbarian Lands is a challenge hardcore, single-player ARPG set in a barbarian open world. The game features fast-paced combat with a lot of different weapons, exploration to find anything, horizontal and vertical, an unique risk/reward progression system, epic loots and dungeons a dangerous world.

items.title: 逆天改命：高考倒计时60天
items.short_description: 距离最终审判仅剩 60 天。你将扮演一位具有超级英雄般能力的神秘老师，接手几名即将滑入社会深渊的学生。在天台被废弃的教室里，利用极限的时间规划与课程分配，对他们进行培养，提升他们的成绩。考上顶尖学府，即可逆转命运；一旦落榜，万劫不复。他们的命运，皆在你一念之间。

items.title: Regeneration Engine
items.short_description: Fall into the ENGINE and try to fight your way back up to the surface in this turn-based RPG. As your companions die, consume their essences to grow stronger. Explore a strange underground world with your party, battle creatures roaming the dark, and discover the mystery behind the apocalypse.

items.title: Looter Survivors
items.short_description: Looter Survivors blends survivors-like combat with hack-and-slash loot. Build around randomized gear effects, summon a massive army beside your hero, and fight horde against horde in a compact roguelite designed to be cleared in about 10 hours by focused players.

items.title: NEKO-MIMI SWEET HOUSEMATES Vol. 2 Demo
items.short_description: Mint and her friends return in NEKO-MIMI SWEET HOUSEMATES 2! In order to save her family, a girl will defy fate itself and become the personification of miracles...

items.title: Courier Beware Demo
items.short_description: Deliver to haunted places, solve paranormal mysteries, and struggle through the daily grind in this horror life sim adventure.

items.title: Sumo Battlegrounds
items.short_description: Sumo is a strategy board game where players maneuver pieces of varying strengths on a 9x9 grid to push and pull their opponent's pieces off the board, combining simple mechanics with deep strategic possibilities.

items.title: Wyvern Warriors
items.short_description: Wyvern Warriors is a third-person flying action game focused on fast-paced multitasking and aerial combat.

items.title: Panzer Island Demo
items.short_description: A pixel-art anime strategy game where every move triggers a reaction. Play as Erika, an amnesiac scientist guided by three AI soldiers, piecing together what destroyed the island she built to protect. Drones only react when you act. Upgrade between missions. Chapter 1 is free (part of the demo).

items.title: Sortilege Demo
items.short_description: 对立巫师之间的策略骰子对决。审时度势，放手一搏，用骰子击败对手。

items.title: Corrupt Knight Demo
items.short_description: 《Corrupt Knight》是一款将深刻剧情与硬核玩法相结合的游戏。在游戏中，你最多可以获得10种技能，从敌人身上获取装备。重生时你会失去技能并需要重新搭配，但已获得的装备不会丢失，从而让你每次重生都变得更加强大。

items.title: Just Keep Defending And Mining Demo
items.short_description: Just Keep Defending And Mining is a unique incremental game that combines combat and resource gathering. Balance mining and survival, invest into upgrades, grow stronger every round, unlock new regions, and Just Keep Defending and Mining.

items.title: Hue Hue Defense Demo
items.short_description: A mysterious villain unleashes a virus, bringing internet memes to life as a bizarre army marching toward the city's airport. Build towers, unlock powerful abilities, and defend Camaracity from a worldwide outbreak. Stop Hue Hue B'Erri, the king of trolling, before he reaches his final destination.

items.title: Desktop Snail Assassin Demo
items.short_description: 一款放置类桌面蜗牛幸存游戏。这只杀机四伏的蜗牛刺客时不时就会追杀你的鼠标光标，把你的桌面变成一场混乱的弹幕地狱。你能撑多久？！

items.title: Mad Merchant Demo
items.short_description: Build, arm, and command a merchant train across a hostile wasteland. Choose your routes, trade for profit, upgrade your wagons, and survive deadly ambushes on the rails.

items.title: Arms Race Demo
items.short_description: A bullet hell rougelite where every floor is inspred by a diffrent contients mythology and enemies use items/weapons! fight trough folklore enemies steal their loot and fight against them again next round after theyve stolen your loot in return

items.title: Tank Them All Demo
items.short_description: 一款适合 2–6 名玩家的混乱俯视角坦克乱斗游戏——可本地或在线游玩。收集 16 种狂野强化道具，在毒气云和空袭中生存下来，并在包含 King of the Hill 和 Golden Shell 的 4 种游戏模式中称霸超过 90 个竞技场。

items.title: Purgatory Shift Demo
items.short_description: You are trapped in a bureaucratic purgatory. Judge souls, gamble on slots, buy upgrades and try to escape.

items.title: Rakeo
items.short_description: A platformer about Rakeo, a girl who embarks on a fantastical adventure to become the princess of the Cookie Kingdom and save the world from unexpected and disturbing dangers.

items.title: SFTP - Super Football Tactics Pro Demo
items.short_description: Super Football Tactics Pro drops you into the high-energy chaos of a wild football league where classic checkers meets hard-hitting strategy. Plan your moves, outsmart your opponent, and unleash game-changing special powers that can flip the match in an instant.

items.title: Arcade World Cups
items.short_description: Pure arcade football, inspired by an unforgettable classic. Fast matches, goals, and nonstop excitment.

items.title: Sinister Outbreak
items.short_description: 在丧尸横行的实验室中醒来，揭开灾难背后的真相，在恐怖、动作和悬疑交织的紧张刺激中为生存而战。

items.title: Silent Terminal Demo
items.short_description: Silent Terminal is a terminal-based dark fantasy RPG with ASCII exploration, turn-based combat, branching quests, character progression, and persistent world changes. Create your character, explore ruined lands, and survive inside the terminal.

items.title: Table 9
items.short_description: 在一家不断循环的欧式精品咖啡馆里把咖啡送到9张桌子，察觉悄悄侵入的异常，并抵达Table 9。

items.title: AGX GP Demo
items.short_description: 《AGX》是一款令人心率飙升的超高速反重力竞速游戏。疾如闪电的画面表现与基于极限能力的玩法，将把你的反应与技巧推向极致！欢迎来到《AGX》！

items.title: Surf Sandbox Demo
items.short_description: Surf Sandbox 是一款精致、悠闲的冲浪模拟游戏，拥有真实的物理水体效果。在这里，你可以创造属于自己的完美巨浪，捕捉温和的小波，迎接猛烈的近岸浪头，完成华丽的腾空，体验钻浪管的快感，或是单纯地坐下来放松，静看浪花翻涌。

items.title: Slow Roads Demo
items.short_description: Unwind on a peaceful journey through endless scenic landscapes. Generate a unique world, set the weather to suit your mood, and just drive...

items.title: Terraclysm Survivors Demo
items.short_description: Terraclysm Survivors is a fast-paced action roguelike sidescroller. Earth is in peril, jump and attack through treacherous stages packed with enemy hordes while building the ultimate loadout. With up to 8 players online, defeat the invaders and survive in this apocalyptic and chaotic challenge!

items.title: Fit Happens: A Clothing Shop Simulator Demo
items.short_description: 在一个小镇经营一家服装店，进货服装和配饰，设定价格，装饰你的店铺，参加时装秀，并随着你将空荡的店面发展成一家繁荣的精品店而提升声誉。

items.title: 艾特尔：神祇之路
items.short_description: 在这款充满传说与独特新物种的4X即时策略游戏中，获得神之力量，统治整个世界。让手下作战单位进化，统领各路军队；让宏伟的城市发展壮大；研究并掌握奥秘咒术，将世界夷为废土。开辟通往权力的道路，最终飞升成神，凌驾于一切之上。

items.title: 幻想郷大激突 : Touhou Impact Demo
items.short_description: 幻想郷大激突 : Touhou Impact 是《东方Project》的非官方二次创作游戏。 妖怪出现了。很多，不，是多得离谱。这显然是一场异变。不过不用担心，幻想乡的做法一向很简单：先把它们全部打倒，犯人之后再找就行了。

items.title: Graveyard Report Demo
items.short_description: 拍摄异常现象，收集证据。通过监控显示器查看可疑区域、物品或异常存在，完成每小时的证据配额。未完成任务将被解雇！解开谜题，揭开真相，并努力活过夜晚。

items.title: Verdant Requiem Demo
items.short_description: “SRPG in Search of Balance" On a continent where three nations’ ideals clash, what will you choose, and what will you protect? Verdant Requiem is a SRPG about a war for balance beyond good and evil, featuring detailed 2D maps, branching storylines, resource management, and elemental balance.

items.title: Juice Board Demo
items.short_description: Add some juice to your typing with custom carets, satisfying effects, and reactive word combos that work across your desktop. Unlock the entire Codex through achievements as you type.

items.title: Reef Rise Demo
items.short_description: Reef Rise 是一款简短的放置类钓鱼游戏。捕捉鱼类，探索新的珊瑚礁，发现闪光变种，完成任务，并解锁永久升级来强化你的装备。

items.title: Hex Tower Boogie Demo
items.short_description: Hex Tower Boogie is a tower defense game about stacking absurd combos. A cannon that one-shots everything every 10 seconds? Sure. A homing splash tower? Take it. Homing + multishot + piercing + bonus damage on one bullet? ...yeah, you can have that too.

items.title: Ironfront Express Demo
items.short_description: Upgrade your engine’s arsenal in this bullet hell, tower defense roguelite featuring the most heavily armored locomotive in existence. Engineer and command the Ironfront Express in a unique take on lane defense where you upgrade with specialized turrets, drones, and tactical abilities.

items.title: Into the Swarm Demo
items.short_description: Choose your hero, evolve your arsenal, and learn to survive a corrupted desert crawling with monsters. Into The Swarm is a 1–2 player co-op bullet heaven where every defeat teaches you how to build smarter, move better, and push deeper into the swarm.

items.title: Dungeon Roller Demo
items.short_description: Roll into action with your snowman warrior as you journey through dungeons filled with enemies, traps, and challenges. Each new chapter brings more danger—can you survive them all?

items.title: Scum's Errand Demo
items.short_description: Raid cursed dungeons, claim powerful loot, and escape before it's too late. Scum's Errand is a top-down roguelite horde shooter with extraction mechanics where every run makes you stronger, but greed can cost you everything.

items.title: Delve Survivors Demo
items.short_description: A blend of classic turn-based roguelike dungeon crawling with the intensity of modern survivors games. Set the pace with every step as you unlock multiple dungeons and blast through swarms of enemies! Gather loot, customize your build, and learn to survive.. the Delve!

items.title: Apology Video
items.short_description: An FMV Choose-Your-Own-Adventure that'll leave you wanting to like and subscribe!

items.title: Orb Breaker Demo
items.short_description: An incremental bullet hell about shooting orbs at enemies, collecting resources, and becoming powerful!

items.title: Crescent Break Demo
items.short_description: Blast robots, use their pieces to start chain reactions, and navigate your way through destructible levels in this platformer ROGUELIKE. Crescent Break fuses together NES-era robot hero goodness with indie classics. Augment your cyborg suit for ridiculous synergies, and try over and over to survive!

items.title: DoDonPachi Resurrection Reignite Demo
items.short_description: 曾让街机玩家热血沸腾的弹幕射击游戏，如今以《新约・怒首领蜂大复活》之名再度启动。 追加关卡、新角色、新BGM，以及全新的要素，共同开启一场新的挑战。

items.title: 变形怪物房间 2222 - Ogre Chambers 2222
items.review_summary: 特别好评 此游戏的 85 篇用户评测中有 98% 为好评。
items.short_description: 在不断变化的竞技场中对抗外星食人魔，在这款 Roguelike 弹幕射击游戏中努力生存 💥 改装你的武器，明智地选择升级路线，并精通飞船操控，征服食人魔密室（OGRE CHAMBERS）！

items.title: 摸鱼幸存者 试玩版
items.short_description: 《摸鱼幸存者》是一款专为摸鱼定制的挂机肉鸽幸存者游戏。它可以化身为一个小巧的悬浮窗口，安静地停留在屏幕任意位置。英雄全自动战斗、走位、升级，你也可以随时接管角色，在怪物浪潮中亲自大杀四方。工作、割草两不误，轻松融入你的工作生活！

items.title: Hell Bug
items.short_description: 粉碎变异虫，从击败的Boss遗骸中解锁新盟友，建立属于你的混乱虫群！《Hell Bug》是一款快节奏的roguelite射击游戏，每击败一个Boss，都能壮大你的奇异强大虫族。每只虫子都有故事，有些不能说。

items.title: SeekOut
items.review_summary: 好评 此游戏的 14 篇用户评测中有 100% 为好评。
items.short_description: 变身为物体，融入环境，躲藏起来，在猎人摧毁一切寻找你时保持生存。使用魔法、陷阱和特殊技能击败对手，甚至为了获得优势，有时还需要破坏自己的队友。

items.title: Danmaku Fighters Demo
items.short_description: 《Danmaku Fighters》是一款新感觉的快节奏 2D 弹幕格斗游戏，您可以从众多角色中选择喜爱的角色，与网路上的其他玩家一同进行弹幕对战！

items.title: Insomnia: Chapter One
items.review_summary: 多半好评 此游戏的 46 篇用户评测中有 76% 为好评。
items.short_description: 2012年，北极站“珀尔修斯”失去与外界的联系。 你是伊桑·米勒，一名被派往现场排除故障的技术员。 但这里显然已经失控。

items.title: Spirit Talk - 温馨治愈系视觉小说
items.review_summary: 好评 此游戏的 10 篇用户评测中有 100% 为好评。
items.short_description: 一款治愈系视觉小说，讲述一位可爱的女巫在奇幻世界中能够与灵体对话。凭借她的力量，Julia 帮助邻里处理日常烦恼。调配药水、选择最佳使用时机，并逐渐了解灵体与来访者，帮助他们找到心灵的安宁。

items.title: Peter the Stash Hunter Demo
items.short_description: 一款经营模拟、寻宝与策略的混合作品。在废弃储物间拍卖会上击败对手猎人,洗劫你赢得的储物间,然后经营那间资助 Peter 寻找失踪祖父的商店。破坏卡牌、荷兰式与英式拍卖、鱼叉追逐战。每一个箱子都可能藏着秘密。

items.title: NERMIUS
items.short_description: Sci-fi roguelite survival. Deploy as a Shell - a corporate combat unit - and fight through waves of hostile alien fauna. Choose your shell, collect upgrades, and survive long enough to face what Saturn Acme Corp won't tell you about.

items.title: 神风帝国
items.short_description: 以神风攻击，杀出胜利之路！以多彩，个性丰富的武器将敌人炸飞，最后将自身化身为肉弹，轰轰烈烈地牺牲自己！ 一边盛大的把周围卷进爆炸中，一边朝终点猛冲的，自爆系STG。“全员，突击－！”

items.title: Wanted Shadows: Unchained
items.short_description: 一款幸存者类游戏，你将击败试图占领冥界的暗夜魔物。击退入侵，完善你的构筑，成为炼狱的主宰。

items.title: Shape Survivors Demo
items.short_description: 竞技场正在缩小。在这个无情的弹幕天堂中，消灭无尽的愤怒几何体群，攀登全球排行榜。收集多边形碎片，升级你的武器，解锁永久的局外成长，在《Shape Survivors》的重压下生存下来。

items.title: Neo Capitalist - Stock Market Survival Simulator Demo
items.short_description: Trade by day. Eat, sleep, and survive by night. Lose everything with a single bad decision. Neo Capitalist is a financial survival roguelite where the richer you get, the harder the system fights back. Play in a realistic stock market simulation or in a dystopian cyber-punk world.

items.title: Websy and the Time Rogues Demo
items.short_description: Swing into battle and smash swarms of enemies with an arsenal of web-shooting gadgets and timeline spanning item builds. Websy and the Time Rogues is an action roguelike with expressive movement and dynamic web abilities. Join the Time Rogues and save the world from being frozen in amber!

items.title: Xeno Strike
items.short_description: 建立你的卡牌收藏，构建卡组，并在科幻卡牌对战中与其他玩家进行对决。

items.title: Melon Rally Demo
items.short_description: Beat time attack stages without letting the loose melons in your trunk fall off.

items.title: 私たちはどう死のうか Demo
items.short_description: A story-driven action game in which a hopeless high school girl confronts her life within her dreams as she turns 18, progressing through magnetic movement, exploration, dialogue, and combat.

items.title: Infinity Lancer Demo
items.short_description: Infinity Lancer is a high octane vertical shoot em' up. Race across the galaxy fighting to prevent humanity's annihilation and discover the dark truth behind the endless war.

items.title: Dreams Of A Visionary Demo
items.short_description: 《梦想家的梦境》是一款第一人称探索冒险游戏，背景设定在一座神秘的维多利亚式豪宅中。探索细节丰富的房间，解决极具挑战性的谜题，逐步揭开这个超现实梦境中隐藏的秘密。

items.title: Infiniterra Demo
items.short_description: A voxel sandbox focused on atmosphere and contrast. Explore layered worlds, survive eerie nights, and uncover what lies beneath the surface.

items.title: Piano High Score Demo
items.short_description: Everything you love about rhythm games, brought to your digital piano. Load your own MIDI files, play on real keys, and climb online leaderboards.

items.title: Dark Queen of Samobor Demo
items.short_description: Embark on a journey inspired by Slavic mythology and Croatian folklore in this 2.5D action-adventure game inspired by the likes of Inside, Neva, and Song of Iron.

items.title: St. Mary's 1985 Demo
items.short_description: You wake up on a red chair in the waiting room of a closed psychiatric hospital. You know this place. Clothes that aren't yours. A file with your name you don't remember reading. Your heartbeat rises. The memories come back. Not all of them want to be remembered. St. Mary's, 1985.

items.title: 罪业烙印
items.review_summary: 特别好评 此游戏的 74 篇用户评测中有 94% 为好评。
items.short_description: 起身吧，受诅咒者。于迷雾交织的边缘之地，碎裂的王冠静卧尘沙，古旧的赐福在远方如微火颤动。你曾无数次坠落，又无数次被遗忘；神明背弃此土，死亡与毁灭顺着地脉蔓延，而人类的愿望在灰烬里轻声呢喃。 于是如此——在万物黯淡的尽头，你反而成为黑暗中最后的火点。

items.title: The Server Demo
items.short_description: A FULLY ENGLISH-VOICED otome mystery visual novel set in a fog-shrouded coastal town. Work as a waitress at an exclusive supper club, romance four men hiding dangerous secrets, and uncover the truth buried beneath. Every choice you make shapes your path and where it ends.

items.title: 雷霆校场 Demo
items.short_description: 在此进行空战截射等技能训练！您可以自由定义飞行器性能、武器性能、相对位置等参数，以便能够对所有空战情况进行模拟练习。且本校场独有的场景一键重置功能，足以让您甚至在短暂的1分钟内完成10次训练。不论对于技能提升，还是保持手感，或是快速热身都有非常大的帮助。

items.title: Mumagi: Stellar Saviors
items.short_description: Mumagi: Stellar Saviors is a challenging co-op bullet heaven where you can gather up to 4 players to take down celestial forces. Choose a magical girl, enhance your powers, and restore time and space to their natural order!

items.title: AETHER CROWN Demo
items.short_description: 一款融合模拟与回合制 RPG 元素的奇幻视觉小说。管理 Carl 的日程，完成公会委托，建立人际关系，提升他的属性和装备，并做出通向多重结局的选择。

items.title: BURI
items.short_description: A story-driven choice-based game where every decision shapes the outcome. Follow Pluem, a boy facing pressure, family expectations, and bullying, with multiple endings determined by your choices.

items.title: Hathor's Peak Demo
items.short_description: Hathor's Peak is a roguelike solitaire, reach the needed score before being out of cards. Progress through the levels, some of which will be boss battles that impose special rules and require you to use your action cards wisely.

items.title: Send It! Demo
items.short_description: You are mail. The mailbox is waiting. Dash and jump through deadly levels at absurd speeds to ensure delivery! Perfect your routes, chase medal times, and master 100 bite-sized levels built for speedrunning and replayability.

items.title: No Blink Allowed Demo
items.short_description: Train your timing skills to stop the clock close to zero, collect shards, and spend them on a massive skill tree in this short arcade-ish incremental game. Struggle with glitching displays, hidden timers, chaotic multi-stops, and other hazards as you improve your accuracy.

items.title: 100 Sherwood Cats
items.short_description: 🐾 加入充满猫咪的主题地点，展开最可爱的冒险！ 😻 探索特别场所迷人的手绘艺术作品，尝试在整个游戏中找到隐藏的100只可爱猫咪。 🐈🕵️‍♂️ 你能找到它们全部吗？ 🕵️‍♂️🐈

items.title: Knight Legion: Rpg Strategy Demo
items.short_description: Lead 4 unique heroes and an army of 12 soldiers to reclaim 100 levels across 10 islands. Defend your monument, level up, upgrade gear, and craft powerful items in this action-packed RPG strategy. Will your legion cleanse the islands of the creature infestation?

items.title: Vanguard Tides Demo
items.short_description: Fight in massive-scale battles where armies paint the battlefield in their color. Captured territory affects both your health and your abilities. Level up your vanguard and your army, defend your castles, and survive the shifting tides of battle to claim ultimate victory!

items.title: Aaattack Demo
items.short_description: Aaattack is a deckbuilder, where you build and customize a deck of magical runes, to fight your foes and send the monsters back to the Underabyss! But beware! The monstrosities of the land have their own runes to fight with. Only a true hero can save this land. Are you ready? Aaattack!!!!

items.title: CoreBreaker: Desktop Swarm Demo
items.short_description: 一款适合屏幕角落的渐进式弹球碎砖游戏。工作时让它在角落静静运行，或切换到全屏亲自掌控全局。解锁全新核心，扩展技能树，在无尽的攻势中生存下来。

items.title: The Profaned
items.short_description: The Profaned is an Anomaly-Hunt horror game about a person who's trying to cleanse his sins. The primary task is to investigate the endless forsaken church to find the anomalies and capture them with your camera to cleanse your sins. And if you fail to do so, start again from the beginning.

items.title: Trials Survivors
items.review_summary: 特别好评 此游戏的 54 篇用户评测中有 87% 为好评。
items.short_description: 在星座主宰设下的试炼中奋战无尽怪潮！ 升级技能、收集遗物，以正宗肉鸽风格打造超强构筑！ 重拾“砍杀”与“弹幕天堂”的幻想魅力。 你能在这款怪物密度爆表的生存类肉鸽游戏中活下来吗？

items.title: DVD Screensaver 2: 30th Anniversary Survivors Edition
items.short_description: The classic DVD Screensaver, turned survivor! Choose upgrades and witness color-activated chaos unfold as you rewrite your way through 30 years of DVD history. Or run it as your actual Windows screensaver!

items.title: Sketch Kingdom Demo
items.short_description: 素描王国是一款短小的放置类游戏，拥有手绘笔记本风格。绘制你自己的生物，收集资源并积累金币以解锁升级。完成任务，解锁技能树中的新能力。简单、迷人，令人意外地上瘾。你能填满整本笔记本吗？

items.title: Cart by Cart: Supermarket Simulator Demo
items.short_description: 经营一家温馨的超市吧。购买货架和商品，为店铺补货，迎接顾客，并在收银台扫描商品。处理现金或刷卡支付，找零准确无误，让你的生意日益兴旺。

items.title: 脉冲武装 Demo
items.short_description: Pulse Armed is a wasteland strategy game: connect modules on a grid, route elements through pipelines into a production chain, test your build in arena combat, and balance resources, pipes, and gear—wire, tune, and prove it in fights.

items.title: Moss：遗落圣物 DEMO
items.short_description: 《Moss：遗落圣物》是一款情感充沛、氛围浓厚的冒险游戏，背景设定在一本活灵活现的故事书中，洋溢着神话色彩与古老魔法气息。引领一位渺小却坚定的英雄，踏上一段关于挑战、勇气与羁绊的动人旅程。

items.title: WTF: Wheels Tires and Flesh Demo
items.short_description: 一款以载具为核心的 Bullet Heaven 游戏。碾碎成群丧尸，打造离谱的武器组合，将你的战车改造成势不可挡的毁灭机器。

items.title: Shoot Together Demo
items.short_description: Run non-stop and blast everything in your way! SINGLE-PLAYER: Level up, fight bosses, and unlock permanent upgrades. PVP MODE: Make split-second roguelike choices mid-run to leave your friend behind and claim the top spot on the leaderboards!

items.title: Paul Bunyan Back to Bangor
items.short_description: Unleash the legend in this 3D Action RPG. Explore the American frontier as Paul Bunyan, collecting mystical Amber to fuel your transformation from a nimble woodsman into a colossal giant. Wield an axe and master the scale-shifting power of a folk hero to protect the land from primordial threats.

items.title: Pillars of Pantheon Demo
items.short_description: Build a moving Roman engine of war block by block, stacking balistae, spears, and divine powers in this fast-paced mythological horde-survival roguelite. Adapt your playstyle to face iconic bosses and endless enemies solo or in co-op. Sacrifice to the gods and let the chaos unfold.

items.title: 空跃之旅:像素天穹 Demo
items.short_description: 空跃之旅：像素天穹 是一款可以1-4人合作挑战的 3D 像素跳跳乐休闲冒险游戏。在天空悬浮平台间跳跃闯关，体验多人联机、全球排行榜与全成就系统，有这各种具有挑战和神奇梦幻的挑战关卡，向着像素天穹之巅不断攀登。

items.title: Imberite Idle Demo
items.short_description: Open chests, collect rare structures, and optimize your build to maximize production in this steampunk idle incremental game.

items.title: Sudoku: Unlimited Expansion
items.short_description: A growing Sudoku puzzle game with expanding Samurai boards, larger classic grids, notes, controller support, and Steam Deck-friendly play.

items.title: Dig into the core
items.short_description: Dig deeper in a run-based mining clicker. Break rocks, collect resources, upgrade skills, artifacts and pickaxes, and uncover 33 mysterious zones on your way to the core.

items.title: 科斯达丽佳的世末终之旅途 Demo
items.short_description: 人类的文明终于燃尽了最后的火种。 幸存者选择聚集在一起，将自己关在安全区域等待死亡的降临。 但科斯达丽佳并没有。 我也是。

items.title: Jancer Demo
items.short_description: 在这款节奏超级紧凑、基于音乐的平台跳跃游戏中，帮助乐舞者找寻他的使命！ 结识化身为猫咪Boss的知名古典作曲家，通过独具匠心的故事体验他们曲作的重混演绎，探索由音乐驱动的世界，寻找秘密音符，并发现隐藏挑战！

items.title: Rotten Chamber Demo
items.short_description: A single-player logic puzzle disguised as social deduction. Read the claims of a corrupt city council, catch the liars and arrest them, but every wrong call brings you closer to losing it all.

items.title: 神之军火
items.review_summary: 特别好评 此游戏的 285 篇用户评测中有 90% 为好评。
items.short_description: 装备整齐，在这款动作类 roguelite 自动射击游戏中开启一场史诗级的地狱之战。最多可同时使用五种武器，通过升级与融合，打造所向披靡的组合，追求极致火力。肩负神圣使命，化身神的正义，拯救濒临混乱的世界。

items.title: Killer Bean
items.review_summary: 褒贬不一 此游戏的 1,281 篇用户评测中有 69% 为好评。
items.short_description: You are Killer Bean, a rogue assassin coffee bean, who takes out the trash in this world, one bullet at a time. This is a first person / third person action roguelike.

items.title: wageslave
items.short_description: A short, narrative, dystopian office survival game. Ship code to eat. Optimise your nootropics stack. Stay sane. Cope with HR's passive-aggressive pings. Climb the career ladder. Retire early (if you can).

items.title: Hammerhead Demo
items.short_description: A short narrative-driven game that explores themes of isolation and nostalgia as player unravels suppressed memories through solving cryptograms.

items.title: 相依视界：泽娜
items.short_description: 泽娜是一款3D桌宠游戏。你将在这里邂逅二次元美少女泽娜，她将在你工作学习之余陪伴你每一天。你可以通过挂机免费获得游戏内货币资源，用于抽取泽娜的服装、动作（表情）、好感度道具。泽娜的相关互动场景玩法我们也在开发中，敬请期待！

items.title: Roguecraft DX Demo
items.short_description: Roguecraft DX is a casual yet challenging turn-based roguelike, crafted for fans of classic dungeon crawlers and inspired by Lovecraftian horror. Explore procedurally generated dungeons with mysterious potions, scary chickens, and secret rooms waiting to be discovered!

items.title: Road to Omaha: College Baseball Dynasty
items.short_description: A deep college baseball dynasty management sim where you build a program across endless seasons: recruit, set lineups and rotations, hire staff, manage schedules, develop players, and play or sim every game pitch by pitch. Can you become the greatest coach of all time?

items.title: Puni the Florist
items.review_summary: 好评 此游戏的 37 篇用户评测中有 100% 为好评。
items.short_description: 《花艺师普妮》是一圈主创意自由的治愈系模拟游戏。经营你的温馨小店，亲手设计独一无二的花束。 快来和蒲妮一起踏上这段傻气可爱、温暖人心又充满共鸣的成长之旅吧!

items.title: Menacetide
items.short_description: Menacetide is a top-down sci-fi shooter where every second counts and every upgrade could mean the difference between extinction and survival. Dodge, destroy, and dominate as you unravel the mysterious forces behind a tide of chaos.

items.title: 挂机猫猫传 Demo
items.short_description: ⭐老牌国家电网合作伙伴⭐独立开发，挂机猫猫传是一款 猫星人 杂烩大乱斗 为题材 —— 以角色抽卡、爽快刷宝、自由培养、经营势力、攻略推图为玩法的 【甜点级】 挂 机 游 戏 喵 ~

items.title: Confectionery Tale
items.short_description: Confectionery Tale is a persistent open world swarm shooter. Play as Kane and traverse Sweetopia while defeating a variety of different confections. Gain levels and collect drops to further increase your power.

items.title: Simulation Simulator Demo
items.short_description: You just did DMT at a campfire in the woods. Now you have to convince your best friend -- a skeptical, monitor-headed guy named Bingus -- that reality is a simulation. He doesn't believe you. The AI powering him doesn't want to. Pick apart the world's seams until one of you breaks.

items.title: 太阳朋克：浮岛家园
items.review_summary: 多半好评 此游戏的 549 篇用户评测中有 75% 为好评。
items.short_description: 《太阳朋克：浮岛家园 Solarpunk》是一款生存游戏，背景设定在一个科技先进、由漂浮岛屿组成的世界。你可以独自一人或与朋友一起建造建筑、种植食物、制作工具，并驾驶飞船探索遥远的天空之岛。 可以利用太阳能、风能和水利打造能源系统，并进行自动化生产作业，如收集资源和灌溉植物。

items.title: Bake Neko Love Demo
items.short_description: You are a depressed Bake-Neko that everyone mistakes for an adorable cat. Your one and only goal: to end it all. A visual novel with multiple choices, featuring diverse, deep, magical and deeply endearing characters. Play the first chapter of the game in this demo !

items.title: Flip & Shop Simulator Demo
items.short_description: 所有模拟器尽在一款游戏中！ 一款合作城市模拟游戏，你和朋友将在同一个庞大的世界中经营各种生意。 开设商店、赚取金钱，并一起或各自发展这座共享的城市。

items.title: 我只是想让她们都幸福
items.short_description: 如果拥有无限复活、穿越时空的超能力，你，会用来做什么呢？是预知未来，拯救世界？还是狂买彩票，一夜暴富？或者……用这份能力……同时和六个妹妹谈恋爱！你做到了无数男人梦寐以求的事，却也踏入了命运的陷阱。脚踏六只船？你只是想让她们都幸福啊，你有什么错！

items.title: Epic Card Battle Simulator Demo
items.short_description: a PvP card auto-battler simulator, play solo or with up-to 6 Friends! Play cards to summon little dudes who auto-battle each other to the death!

items.title: TAILROUGE
items.short_description: TAILROUGE is a fast-paced minimalist action roguelite where your tail is your weapon. Move with the mouse, boost through danger, circle enemies, slice through swarms, and collect powerful cards to evolve your build in short, intense arcade-style runs.

items.title: Ace Expedition Demo
items.short_description: 《王牌远征》是一款深度卡牌构筑Roguelike游戏，你将踏入一片充满未知与神秘的领域。 每一次洗牌，都是全新的传奇开篇。玩家需灵活组合牌型发动攻击与增益，在有限出牌次数内规划最优策略，挑战各种强大的敌人。w

items.title: Argonauts Agency: Curse of Wishes
items.short_description: Her wish for rest sends her on a journey where peace quickly turns into playful chaos and surprises!

items.title: Hearing Voices
items.short_description: Hearing Voices is a unique indie short horror experience where you will need to put your listening and deduction skills to the test to solve puzzles. Mistakes have consequences.

items.title: Noxcode Demo
items.short_description: Reach the TOP by any means possible. Run, jump, climb, fly, or even fall your way up in this chaotic jump quest platformer. Master crazy movement, discover wild shortcuts, and push your skills to the limit!

items.title: Astro Mouse Demo
items.short_description: 《异星鼠鼠》是一款具有丰富休闲放置趣味元素的桌面游戏。古灵精怪的小老鼠“小可”，可以在任何时候出现，陪伴着你穿梭于不同的星球，探索未知的领域，利用丰富的道具获得新奇的物品。

items.title: Street Chef Simulator Demo (街頭廚師模擬器)
items.short_description: 在《Street Chef Simulator》试玩版中体验街头美食生意的乐趣！推着餐车穿梭在阳光明媚的城市，掌握烧烤技巧，提供美味的热狗。管理收入、自定义摊位，并达到 5 级以获取新食材！今天就开启您的烹饪之旅吧！

items.title: Cue Room Demo
items.short_description: Cue Room is a rogue-like billiard game. Shop balls with special abilities, pot them, embrace their unleashed chaos and repeat.

items.title: Will Tell You Everything
items.short_description: 带着疑问翻阅书页。这是一本简单而充满温情的电子书，你可以在这里查看随机出现的命运答案，并记录你的疑问。

items.title: Blue Hawaii Aniki's Soft Ore Demand vol.3
items.short_description: A trashy late-night variety show hosted by a self-proclaimed film director with shaved ice on his head. A burnt-out worker meets a carefree college girl on a grey beach, adults relearn their lost youth at a reskilling school, and four hopeless university guys chase love in vain.

items.title: EDEN95 Demo
items.short_description: EDEN95 是一款幸存者类游戏，在这里你的枪就是你的引擎。利用枪械后坐力在不断升级的波次中存活，在商店里补强自己，并在每一局中变得更强。

items.title: Slashbang Vertical Slice
items.short_description: Enter Slashbang, a narrative driven, movement-first first person shooter taking inspiration from games like Sonic Adventure, Jet Set Radio, and the Metal Gear series.

items.title: The Swarm
items.short_description: The game is about destroying aliens and fighting never ending waves of enemies. It is a retro, bullet hell, arcade like game where you try to score the highest number of points possible. After you die restart from the beginning.

items.title: Train 404 Demo
items.short_description: A first-person co-op horror game where you collect coins, find the Golden Ticket, and race back to the train while monsters close in.

items.title: Skyfire Stronghold
items.short_description: Build and grow an idle medieval town as fast as you can. Gather resources, assign jobs, construct workshops, craft goods for coins, and defend against escalating enemy waves in a race to slay 50 dragons.

items.title: Secret of Circadia Demo
items.short_description: Secret of Circadia is a retro pixel styled RPG Deckbuilder that combines light City Builder elements and Roguelite mechanics with classic Deckbuilder Combat to create a unique, quirky, cute and fun blend!

items.title: Wanderer Wheels Demo
items.short_description: Wanderer Wheels is a cozy, story-driven experience where you travel quiet countryside roads in a mobile van shop, meet strangers, trade goods, and take small jobs, each step bringing you closer to helping your wife receive the care she needs.

items.title: Car Stunt Mania Demo
items.short_description: 基于物理的2D特技赛车游戏，拥有无尽的程序生成地形。在5种环境中完成前空翻、后空翻和超级连击，解锁24辆载具。刷新高分、升级座驾，看看你能坚持多远才翻车。

items.title: Thug Wars
items.short_description: An open world third person crime action shooter game set in three cities, New York, London and Moscow.

items.title: Cultist
items.short_description: Cultist is card game about begining of the religions and the way they grow, interact and even become immortal. Can you outgrow the world that contains yourself and become much bigger?

items.title: 乌龙探案
items.short_description: 自称名侦探的南子与助手展开全23话的搞笑侦探冒险。点击寻找线索，大喊「犯人就是你！」──每次都猜错。人类史上最离谱名侦探的迷之推理，现在开始。这波啊，这波是格局太大了。

items.title: 宠我一生：桌面宠物
items.short_description: 《宠我一生》是一款温馨治愈的桌面宠物养成游戏。把可爱的虚拟宠物养在电脑桌面，陪伴你工作、学习与休闲。喂食、互动、装扮、布置小屋，看着小宠物每天的陪伴，收获满满的陪伴与治愈感。

items.title: Dissociated Worth Demo
items.short_description: You have no power. No allies. No certainty. A cryptic force sends you to face the impossible, where you have to see through your opponents lies before they see through yours, be they human or not.

items.title: Cut the Strings DEMO
items.short_description: 这是一场为献祭而战的战斗。 新娘＜生贄＞少女在战场上击倒被遗弃的人造士兵的第三人称射击游戏。 虚构的战后世界，腐朽的都市，荒谬的命运与抉择。 探索广阔战场，强化肉体与武器，为她开辟前路。

items.title: Chromadi
items.short_description: Mix and match colors and blast your way through waves of Chromies in this fast-paced retro arcade shooter. Play as the Chroma Crew to defend the Rainbar and restore color to the fading planet of Chromara!

items.title: Damn Exam
items.short_description: You thought your job was to educate the youth? Think again. You are here to keep them in line. These brats have no intention of doing the exam the right way, instead they will just cheat, cheat, cheat! You are the last line of defense and must catch every cheating student.

items.title: Keepy UP Demo
items.short_description: Push yourself ever higher in this challenging reimagining of a classic childhood game. Guide your balloon through a vertical gauntlet of seagulls, ghosts, UFOs and more! Your balloon is your only friend, and gravity is your greatest foe. Are you skilful enough to Keepy UP?

items.title: 秋叶原盲盒店模拟器
items.review_summary: 多半好评 此游戏的 77 篇用户评测中有 72% 为好评。
items.short_description: (6.8发售！)在秋叶原开店是什么体验？进货、摆货、自由定价，亲手打造二次元的梦想圣地！但这不只是生意——你更要化身头号玩家，经营间歇无限连抽！集齐超过10000种变体的海量图鉴！从一家家徒四壁的小店，到陈列稀有手办的传说痛店，用你的商业头脑（偶尔也用一用物理手段），制霸秋叶原！

items.title: GLIMPO Demo
items.short_description: Fight endless waves of enemies in this arcade roguelite shooter. Build and level up your skillset, unlock synergies and become ridiculously overpowered!

items.title: Access Acquired Demo
items.short_description: Censorship, corruption, and exploitation. Fight for the future of the citizens of Mendax and riot against the totalitarian government. Step into the shoes of Punkbot and fight enemies with tight and energetic combat in the 3D hack and slash game Access Acquired.

items.title: Tellyport
items.review_summary: 好评 此游戏的 29 篇用户评测中有 96% 为好评。
items.short_description: Play as Sally, the granddaughter of a brilliant and eccentric inventor, who invited you to explore her 70s lab, filled with unique inventions. Solve puzzles by crossing TV screens that alter your gravity, size, or both. Observation, manipulation, and thinking are key to progressing!

items.title: School of Nightmares
items.short_description: 由成绩压力交织而成的诡异噩梦。逃离无尽循环的教室，踩着悬浮在漆黑半空中的课桌向上攀爬。避开恐怖怪物的视线，寻找散落的记忆之书，你必须从这个地狱般的学校中醒来。

items.title: Rollie
items.short_description: Rollie is a fast 2D endless runner where you jump over obstacles, grab rare gold, chase high scores, defuse bombs, and unlock new ball skins through skill and persistence.

items.title: Dragon Girls
items.short_description: Defeat countless enemies and survive. Dragon Girls is an action game with roguelike elements. In the blink of an eye, hundreds of monsters can come after you.

items.title: A Game About Creating The Universe Demo
items.short_description: An idler game where you get to build up the universe from scratch. You are a part of an advanced space civilization that builds universes.

items.title: Behelade Demo
items.short_description: Fight your way through this challenging Bullet Hell Shoot ‘Em Up, consisting of 5 stages full of beautiful, intricate patterns and bosses. Wield the magic sword “Behelade” to find out what is behind the mysterious power that made the forest creatures go on a mad Danmaku rampage!

items.title: Obrum: The Demo
items.short_description: OBRUM is a roguelite puzzle game about controlled chaos. Build unstable chain reactions across a 4×4 grid, draft (and leverage) powerful Rules, survive the rising Overcharge, and push this collapsing system to its limit in a high-pressure battle for mastery.

items.title: Soup Weather Demo
items.short_description: A short narrative exploration game in which you play as Bean, an unemployed, 20-something, smart-ass. Wander around town, play mini games, feed the geese, and get to know the neighbours as Bean’s sanity begins to slip...

items.title: Warring Clans
items.short_description: This card game uses shapes, colors and rock-paper-scissors mechanisms to score points. There are three land and character types. Simple to learn, hard to master.

potential_items.title: MECCHA CHAMELEON
potential_items.review_summary: 多半好评 此游戏的 70 篇用户评测中有 75% 为好评。
potential_items.short_description: 把自己涂满颜色，融入背景吧！《Meccha Chameleon》是一款全新感觉的捉迷藏游戏，玩家需要在自己纯白的身体上绘图以拟态成关卡中的样子。躲藏地点、姿势，以及最重要的“画功”是生存的关键。用连变色龙都自愧不如的技术欺骗追捕者的眼睛，在时限内逃出生天吧！您还可以轻松享受随机匹配或观众参与型直播。

potential_items.title: NBA THE RUN
potential_items.review_summary: 褒贬不一 此游戏的 201 篇用户评测中有 69% 为好评。
potential_items.short_description: Take your favorite NBA stars to iconic streetball courts around the world, in this fast-paced, online 3v3 basketball game. Stack wins, earn cred and become the GOAT of THE RUN. Who's Got Next?

potential_items.title: 沙雕之路
potential_items.review_summary: 好评如潮 此游戏的 998 篇用户评测中有 96% 为好评。
potential_items.short_description: 某一天，一个叫做丁德成的人看到邻居家晚饭吃凉拌海蜇，很馋，于是决定出门买海蜇。他与路上结识的同伴在沙雕大陆开始了一段充满想象的旅行，最终穿越多个次元，上演了一段波澜壮阔的买海蜇之旅。

potential_items.title: 沃德灵：共生
potential_items.review_summary: 特别好评 此游戏的 389 篇用户评测中有 93% 为好评。
